headline: Bernstein Raises its Price Target on Fastenal (FAST) to $42
summary: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) is one of the 10 Best Debt Free Blue Chip Stocks to Invest In. On April 13, 2026, Bernstein raised its price target on Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) to $42 from $38. The firm noted that while the company is benefiting from strong PMI trends and sales growth, margins came in weaker than […]

headline: Fastenal Company: Tariff Concerns On Top Of An Expensive Valuation
summary: Fastenal Company remains a hold as strong demand and broad-based revenue growth are offset by persistent pricing and margin pressures. Learn more about FAST stock here.
